description: Run mdsmith fix on a Markdown file after Edit or Write

hooks.command: F=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') || { echo 'mdsmith-tools hook: jq failed reading tool input' >&2; exit 1; }; case "$F" in *.md|*.markdown) mdsmith fix -- "$F"; r=$?; [ $r -le 1 ] && exit 0 || exit $r;; esac
